text: There may be multiple Kalamus running at once, we need to ensure that the #gui shows this in the browser title as well as the title at the top of the page. Infer the project name either based on package.json or installation directory so the title can be `Kalamu | {PROJECT_NAME}`

Whole-outline PUT (undo/clean) from a stale client strips fields its server's Zod schema doesn't know (default strip mode) - seen 2026-07-10: a pre-assignee tab's Clean up erased assignee fields. Consider passthrough on nodeSchema for PUT, or a version handshake that tells stale UIs to reload

Show on the #gui if the Vite server is not running - some sort of warning so users don't do work and see it disappear into the ether... Shall we disable edits in such a state? Discuss before implementing

Priorities are only usable for tasks, not text notes - when a priority is set (parsing text or command palette) - instead of 'hiding' it for text nodes, in addition to setting the priority, convert the node into a task
Create a #CLI command `kalamu all` that is an alias for `kalamu next --all`
Design + write real landing content (hero, live outline demo island, install, agent story) #landing
Deploy landing to kalamu.dev (CF Pages or Vercel, root dir packages/landing) + DNS at registrar #landing
